case_title: BIANCHI, ELISA vs. MARTINEZ, JOSEPH et al

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSEPH
